---
title: "Queen Quality"
author: "Dylan Ryals"
date: "2026-02-06"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Genomic Selection from skim-seq of queens and phenotypic records

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(Matrix)
library(cowplot)
library(readxl)
library(corrplot)
library(ggrepel)
library(lme4)
library(sjPlot)

select = dplyr::select
rename = dplyr::rename
theme_set(theme_bw())

se = function(x) sqrt(var(x, na.rm = T)/length(x))

setwd("/home/dylan/Documents/bees/harpurlab/project/gensel/tarpy/queen-quality")
```


read in data and manipulate
```{r}
#read phenotypic data
pheno = read.csv("data/cleaned_pheno.csv")

#explore trends across time
  # pheno.mod = pheno %>% 
  #   filter(!is.na(m.Body), !is.na(v.Sperm))
  # pheno.mod = pheno.mod %>% 
  #   mutate(weight.resid = lm(m.Body ~ loc.fix, data = pheno.mod)$residuals,
  #          vsperm.resid = lm(v.Sperm ~ loc.fix, data = pheno.mod)$residuals)
  # 
  # #phenotype over time?
  # ggplot(pheno.mod, aes(x = year, y = weight.resid)) + 
  #   geom_point() +
  #   geom_smooth(method = 'lm', se = F)
  # 
  # ggplot(pheno.mod, aes(x = year, y = vsperm.resid)) + 
  #   geom_point() +
  #   geom_smooth(method = 'lm', se = F)

#genotype PCA
  eig = read.delim("data/samples-pca.eigenval", header = F)
    eig$perc = eig$V1 / sum(eig$V1)
    eig$x = 1:nrow(eig)
    
    eig %>% filter(x < 25) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(y = perc, x = x)) + geom_col()

  pca.geno = read.delim("data/samples-pca.eigenvec", header = F, sep = "")[,c(1,3:5)]
    colnames(pca.geno) = c("gc_id", "PC1", "PC2", "PC3")
    
    pca.geno = pca.geno %>% 
      left_join(pheno %>% select(gc_id, loc.fix, year, v.Sperm, m.Body))
  
    ggplot(pca.geno, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = loc.fix)) + geom_point()
    
#admixture plotting
    #read admix data
    admix = cbind(read.delim("data/finaladmix.fam", header = F, sep = "")[,1],
                  read.delim("data/finaladmix.4.Q", header = F, sep = "")
                  )
      colnames(admix)[1]="gc_id"
      
    reffam = read.delim("references/refData.txt")
    
    #verify lineage identity
    lins = admix %>% left_join(reffam %>% select(gc_id = SRR, lineage)) %>% 
      filter(grepl ("SRR", gc_id)) %>%
      pivot_longer(starts_with("V")) %>%
      group_by(name, lineage) %>%
      mutate(m = mean(value)) %>% ungroup %>% 
      group_by(name) %>% arrange(desc(m)) %>% slice(1) %>% select(lineage, name)
    
    #rename
    admix = admix %>% rename(A = V4, M = V1, C = V2, O = V3) %>% 
      left_join(pheno %>% select(gc_id, loc.fix))
    
    #admixture bar chart
    admix.bar = admix 
    
      #add bar id
      admix.bar = admix.bar %>% arrange(loc.fix, A)
      admix.bar$barid = (1:nrow(admix.bar))
      #melt --- long format
      admix.long = admix.bar %>% 
        pivot_longer(cols = c("A", "M", "C", "O"), values_to = "value",
                     names_to = "fam") %>% 
        mutate(fam = factor(fam, levels =c("A", "M", "C", "O")))
      
          #admixture bar chart
   ggplot(data = admix.long %>% filter(!is.na(loc.fix))) +
      geom_bar(aes(x = as.factor(barid), y = value, fill = fam), 
               stat='identity', width = 1) +
      facet_grid(cols = vars(loc.fix), scales = "free_x") +
      scale_fill_brewer(palette = "PRGn") +
      labs(x = "sample", y = "Proportion of Genome", fill = "Lineage") + 
      theme_bw()

#phenotype PCA
  pheno.num = pheno %>% 
    select(m.Body, v.Sperm, l.Sperm, t.Sperm, w.Head, w.Thorax, d.Spermatheca) %>% 
    as.matrix() %>% apply(MARGIN = 2, FUN = as.numeric)
  
  pheno.num %>% cor(use = 'complete.obs') %>% corrplot()
  
  pheno.scale = pheno.num %>% apply(MARGIN = 2, FUN = scale)
  pheno.scale[is.na(pheno.scale)] = 0
  

  pca.pheno = pheno.scale %>% 
    prcomp(center = F, scale = F) 
  
  biplot(pca.pheno)
  
#correlations b/w admixture and phenotypes
  admixpheno = admix %>% 
    left_join(pheno %>% 
                select(gc_id, m.Body, v.Sperm)) %>% 
    filter(!is.na(m.Body))
  
  admixphenocor = admixpheno %>% select(m.Body, v.Sperm, A, M, C, O) %>% as.matrix
  corrplot(cor(admixphenocor))
  
  #models
  
  summary(lm(m.Body ~ loc.fix + M + A , data = admixpheno))
  
  massmod = lmer(m.Body ~ M + C + O + (1|loc.fix) , data = admixpheno)
  AIC(massmod)
  summary(massmod)
  
  plot_model(massmod)
  

#effects of location and year 
  pheno2 = pheno
  pheno2$loc.fix[pheno2$loc.fix %in% c("NCA", "SCA", "CA")] = "CA"
  pheno2 = pheno2 %>% 
    mutate(loc.fix = as.factor(loc.fix),
           loc.fix = relevel(loc.fix, "USA"))
  
  summary(lm(v.Sperm ~ year + loc.fix, data = pheno2))
  
  summary(lm(m.Body ~ year + loc.fix, data = pheno2))

  #average weight per location
  
  
  
  #TODO: try correcting with KING?
  
#Fstat and pheno
  fstat = read.delim("data/samples-filter.het") %>% 
    select(gc_id = INDV, fstat = `F`) %>% 
    left_join(admixpheno)
  
    fcor = fstat %>% select(m.Body, v.Sperm, fstat) %>% as.matrix()
    corrplot(cor(fcor, use = "pairwise.complete.obs"))
  
  ggplot(fstat, aes(x = fstat, y = v.Sperm)) + 
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5)
  

#GWAS 
  
  #TODO: adjust by independent chr segments, not bonf
  
  #viability
  v.mlma = read.delim("data/qq_vsperm.mlma", sep = "")
  v.mlma$padj = p.adjust(v.mlma$p, method = "bonferroni", n = nrow(v.mlma))
  v.mlma$logp = log(v.mlma$padj, base = 10)* -1
  v.mlma$lograwp = log(v.mlma$p, base = 10) * -1
  
  #pub-friendly plot
  v.plot = v.mlma %>% 
    arrange(Chr, bp) %>% 
    mutate(order = 1:nrow(v.mlma))
  
  v.plot$color = ifelse(v.plot$Chr%%2 ==0, "A", "B" )
    
    
  #weight
  w.mlma = read.delim("data/qq_weight.mlma", sep = "")
  w.mlma$padj = p.adjust(w.mlma$p, method = "bonferroni", n = nrow(w.mlma))
  w.mlma$logp = log(w.mlma$padj, base = 10)* -1
  w.mlma$lograwp = log(w.mlma$p, base = 10) * -1
  
  #pub-friendly plot
  w.plot = w.mlma %>% 
    arrange(Chr, bp) %>% 
    mutate(order = 1:nrow(w.mlma))
  
  w.plot$color = ifelse(w.plot$Chr%%2 ==0, "A", "B" )
  
  #together
  
  man.plot = rbind(w.plot %>% mutate(trait = "Body Mass"),
                   v.plot %>% mutate(trait = "Sperm Viability"))
  
  ggplot(man.plot, aes(x = order, y = lograwp, color = color)) + 
    geom_point() + 
    geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 
                     (-1 * log(0.05 / nrow(w.plot), base = 10))),
           linetype = 2, col = 'black') +
    facet_wrap(~trait, nrow = 2) +
    labs(y = "-log(p)", x = "Position") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "darkgray"))+
    theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
          legend.position = 'none')
  
#output top hits
  all.mlma.l = list(v.mlma, w.mlma)
  traits = c("v.Sperm", "m.Body")
  
  all.mlma = data.frame(SNP = NA,
                        Chr = NA, 
                        bp = NA, 
                        A1 = NA, 
                        A2 = NA,
                        b = NA,
                        p = NA, 
                        padj = NA,
                        trait  = NA)
  
  for(i in 1:length(all.mlma.l)){
    x = all.mlma.l[[i]] %>% filter(padj < 0.05) %>% arrange(padj) %>%
          select(SNP, Chr, bp, A1, A2, b,p, padj) %>% 
      mutate(trait = traits[i])
    all.mlma = rbind(all.mlma, x)
  }
  all.mlma = all.mlma[-1,] %>% 
    arrange(Chr, bp)
  
  # write.csv(all.mlma, file = "data/gwashits.csv",
  #           row.names = F, quote = F)
  # 
  
  N = nrow(pheno)
  
#variance explained by top hits
  varexp = v.mlma %>% filter(padj < 0.05) %>% 
    mutate(varexp = (2 * b**2 * Freq * (1-Freq)) / 
                    (2 * b**2 * Freq * (1-Freq) +
                     se**2 * 2 * N * Freq * (1-Freq)) 
           )
  
  
  
  # #read allele frequencies
  # af = read.delim("data/samples-filter.frq", sep = "", header = T)
  # varexp = af %>% 
  #   select(SNP, MAF) %>% 
  #   left_join(all.mlma %>% 
  #               select(SNP, b, padj, trait)) %>% 
  #   filter(!is.na(b)) %>% 
  #   mutate(varexp = abs(( 2 * MAF * (1-MAF))**2 * b / 0.0109))
  
#compare against GREML h2 
  greml = read.delim("data/greml_weight.snp.blp",
                     header = F, sep = "")
    colnames(greml) = c("SNP", "alt", "G1", "G2", "G3", "G4", "R")
    greml = greml %>% 
      mutate(G = G1 + G2 + G3 + G4)
    
    varexp = varexp %>% 
      left_join(greml %>% select(SNP, G))
    
    #format for output
    varexp.out = varexp %>% 
      mutate(chr = gsub("([0-9]*)[:][0-9]*", "\\1", SNP),
             pos = gsub("[0-9]*[:]([0-9]*)", "\\1", SNP)) %>% 
      mutate(MAF = round(MAF,2),
             b = round(b,4),
             padj = paste0("\'", formatC(padj, format = "e", digits = 2)),
             varexp = round(varexp, 4),
             G = round(G,4),
             pos = paste0("\'", pos)) %>% 
      arrange(desc(varexp)) %>% 
      select(trait, `Chromosome` = chr, `Position` = pos, 
             `Allele Frequency` = MAF, `SNP effect` = b,
             `Pvalue` = padj, `Variance Explained` = varexp,
             `SNP heritability` = G)
    
    write.csv(varexp.out, file = "data/variance_explained.csv",
              row.names = F)
  
  
#QQplots 
  qqPlot <- function(pval, truncate = FALSE, ylim=NULL, thinThreshold=NULL, ci=TRUE, ...) 
{
  # pvalue is a vector of p-values
  # truncate is T/F whether to truncate the y-axis (observed) to the same limits as the x-axis (expected)
  # thin is whether to thin insignificant p-values
  
  pval <- -log10(sort(pval)) # sort() removes NAs
  n <- length(pval)
  a <- 1:n
  b <- a/n
  x <- -log10(b)
  
  if (!is.null(thinThreshold)){
    breaks <- seq(from=0, to=thinThreshold, length.out=11)
    pval.cut <- cut(pval, breaks=breaks, right=FALSE)
    #quant <- quantile(pval[pval < thinThreshold], probs=1:10/10)
    #pval.cut <- cut(pval, breaks=c(0, quant), right=FALSE)
    ind.list <- list()
    for (level in levels(pval.cut)){
      sel <- which(pval.cut == level)
      ind.list[[level]] <- sel[sample.int(length(sel), min(1000, length(sel)))]
    }
    ind.list[["max"]] <- which(pval >= thinThreshold)
    ind <- unlist(ind.list, use.names=FALSE)
    ind <- sort(ind) # sorting necessary for polygon, below
  } else {
    ind <- 1:n
  }
  
  
  char <- rep(1,n)
  if(!is.logical(truncate) | truncate){
    if (is.logical(truncate)){
      maxx <- max(x)+2  
    } else {
      maxx <- min(truncate, max(pval))
    }
    
    ylm <- c(0,maxx)
    ylb <- expression(paste(-log[10], "(observed P) - truncated"))
    nx <- length(which(pval > maxx))
    if(nx > 0){
      pval[1:nx] <- maxx
      char[1:nx] <- 2
    }
    
  } else {
    ylm <- ylim
    ylb <- expression(paste(-log[10], "(observed P)"))
  }
  plot(x[ind], pval[ind], type = "n", ylim = ylm, ylab = ylb,
       xlab = expression(paste(-log[10], "(expected P)")), ...)
  # upper and lower have already been subset
  if (ci){
    upper <- qbeta(0.05, a[ind], rev(a)[ind])
    lower <- qbeta(0.95, a[ind], rev(a)[ind])

    polygon(-log10(c(b[ind], rev(b[ind]))), -log10(c(upper, rev(lower))), density=NA, col="gray")
  }
  points(x[ind], pval[ind], pch = 19, ...)  
  abline(0,1,col="red")  
}
    

qqPlot(v.mlma$p)
qqPlot(w.mlma$p)

  

  
```

Quick figs
```{r}
#genetic PCA
gpca = read.delim(paste0("data/", SET, ".eigenvec"),
                  sep = "", header = F)[,c(1, 3:5)]
  colnames(gpca) = c("vcf_id", "PC1", "PC2", "PC3")
  
  preblup = preblup %>% left_join(gpca)
  
  ggplot(preblup, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Location)) + 
    geom_point()

```


# Genomic Selection

CV error
```{r}
cv = read.csv("data/CV_summary.csv")

cv.long = cv %>% 
  pivot_longer(c(cor, slope), names_to = "param", values_to = "value")

  #rename
  cv.long$param[cv.long$param == "slope"] = "Slope"
  cv.long$param[cv.long$param == "cor"] = "Correlation"
  cv.long$tn[cv.long$tn == "w"] = "Body Mass"
  cv.long$tn[cv.long$tn == "v"] = "Sperm Viability"

cv.mean = cv.long %>% 
  group_by(tn, param) %>% 
  summarise(mean = mean(value),
            se = se(value))


ggplot(cv.long, aes(x = tn, y = value)) + 
  geom_point() + 
  geom_col(data = cv.mean, aes(x = tn, y = mean), alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_errorbar(data = cv.mean, 
                aes(x = tn, y = mean, ymax = mean + se, ymin = mean - se),
                width = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~param, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Value")
```


read results: quantitative
```{r}
#read phenotype file.....
pheno.blup = read.delim("data/pheno.txt",
                        header = F, sep = "")

colnames(pheno.blup) = c("iid", "locid", "PC1", "PC2", "PC3", "lsperm", "weight", "vsperm", "tsperm", 
                         "locyear", "gc_id", "pheno_id")


#pull solutions: 2-trait
  sol = read.delim("data/sol-wv.txt", sep = "", header = F)[-1,]
    colnames(sol) = c("trait", "effect", "level" ,"solution", "se")
    sol = sol %>% mutate(se = as.numeric(se),
                         solution = as.numeric(solution))  

  sol.long = sol %>% 
    filter(effect == 1) %>% select(-effect) %>% rename(bv = solution) %>% 
    mutate(trait = recode(trait, `1` = "weight", `2` = "vsperm"))
  
  sol.long = sol.long %>% 
    left_join(pheno.blup %>% select(level = iid, gc_id, locyear) %>% 
                mutate(level = as.character(level))) %>% 
    mutate(year = gsub(".*([0-9]{4})$", "\\1", locyear))
  
    sol.wide = sol.long %>%
    pivot_wider(values_from = c(se, bv), names_from = trait)

  sol.wide %>% select(starts_with("bv")) %>% pairs()

#plot against raw pheno
  
  pbv = sol.wide%>% 
    left_join(pheno.blup %>% select(gc_id, weight, vsperm, lsperm))
  
  ggplot(pbv, aes(x = weight, y = bv_weight)) + geom_point()
  ggplot(pbv, aes(x = vsperm, y = bv_vsperm)) + geom_point()
  
#plot against time
  sol.time = sol.long %>% filter(locyear != "USA20XX") %>% 
    mutate(year = as.numeric(year))

  ggplot(sol.time, aes(x = year, y = bv)) + 
    geom_point() + 
    geom_smooth(method = 'lm', se = F, color = 'blue', linetype = 1) +
    facet_wrap(~trait)
  

  #model 
  w.mod = lm(bv~ year, data = sol.time %>% filter(trait == "weight"))
  v.mod = lm(bv~ year, data = sol.time %>% filter(trait == "vsperm"))
  
  
#TODO: use BVs not phenos
#estimate genetic gain per generation
  
  #estimated reliability from blupf90
    rel = read.delim("data/acc_bf90",
                     header = F, sep = "")
    colnames(rel) = c("trait", "effect", "level" ,"bv", "rel")
    
    hist(rel$rel[rel$trait == 1])
    hist(rel$rel[rel$trait == 2])
    
      
  
params = data.frame(trait = c("weight", "vsperm"),
                    rel = c(mean(rel$rel[rel$trait == 1]),
                            mean(rel$rel[rel$trait == 2])),
                    acc = c(0.2, 0.2),
                    sdG = c(sqrt(131), sqrt(109)),
                    sdX = c(sd(sol.time$bv[sol.time$trait == "weight"]),
                            sd(sol.time$bv[sol.time$trait == "vsperm"])))


  #difference in standardized breeding value for selected individuals

  sol.time.wide = sol.time %>% 
    select(gc_id, year, trait, bv) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = "trait", values_from = "bv") %>% 
    as.data.frame()
  
  prog = data.frame(prop = rep(c(0.5, 0.1, 0.01, 0.001),2),
                         trait = c(rep("weight", 4), rep("vsperm",4)),
                         intensity = NA,
                         prog = NA)
  
  for(i in 1:nrow(prog)){
    #number of individuals for desired %
    N = ceiling(nrow(sol.time.wide) * prog$prop[i])
    #average of top N phenos
    prog$intensity[i] = mean(sort(sol.time.wide[,prog$trait[i]], 
                                  decreasing = T)[1:N])
    #progress in BV
    prog$prog[i] = prog$intensity[i] *
      params$sdG[params$trait == prog$trait[i]] *
      params$acc[params$trait == prog$trait[i]] /
      params$sdX[params$trait == prog$trait[i]]
  }
  
  #points for theoretical trend
  prog$a = NA
    prog$a[prog$trait == "weight"] = predict(w.mod, data.frame(year = 2025))
    prog$a[prog$trait == "vsperm"] = predict(v.mod, data.frame(year = 2025))
    
  prog$b = prog$a + prog$prog
  
  prog.plot = prog %>% 
    select(prop, trait, a, b) %>% 
    pivot_longer(cols = c("a", "b"), names_to = "point", values_to = "bv")
  
    prog.plot$year = ifelse(prog.plot$point == "b", 2026, 2025)
    prog.plot$trait[prog.plot$trait == "vsperm"] = "Sperm Viability"
     prog.plot$trait[prog.plot$trait == "weight"] = "Body Mass"
     
  
    sol.time.plot = sol.time
      
    sol.time.plot$trait[sol.time.plot$trait == "vsperm"] = "Sperm Viability"
    sol.time.plot$trait[sol.time.plot$trait == "weight"] = "Body Mass"
  
  
  
    ggplot(sol.time.plot, aes(x = year, y = bv)) + 
    geom_point() + 
    geom_smooth(method = 'lm', se = F, color = 'blue', linetype = 1) +
    geom_line(data = prog.plot,
              aes(x = year, y = bv, linetype = as.factor(prop)),
              color = 'red') +
    facet_wrap(~trait, scales = "free") + 
    labs(linetype = "Proportion Selected", y = "Breeding Value",
         x = "Year")
  
  


  
# #plotting BVs
#   p6a = ggplot(pbv, aes(x = weight, y = bv_weight, color = Location,
#                   ymax = bv_weight + se_weight, ymin = bv_weight - se_weight)) +
#     geom_pointrange(size = 1) + 
#     labs(title = "6a. Breeding Values")
#   
#   p6b = ggplot(pbv, aes(x = viability, y = bv_viability, color = Location,
#                   ymax = bv_viability + se_viability, ymin = bv_viability - se_viability)) +
#     geom_pointrange(size = 1) +
#     labs(title = "6b. Breeding Values")
#   
#   pbv$toplabs = pbv$vcf_id
#     pbv$toplabs[pbv$bv_viability < 0.25 | pbv$bv_weight < 0.18] = NA
#   
#   p6c = ggplot(pbv, aes(x = bv_weight, y = bv_viability, color = Location,
#                   label = toplabs)) +
#     geom_point(size = 3) + 
#     geom_label_repel()+
#     labs(title = "6c. Selection Candidates")
  
```
